title: urostigma altissimum
intro: Urostigma altissimum, also known as the tall stinging nettle, is a flowering plant species in the nettle family Urticaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Urostigma altissimum include reducing pain and swelling, treating allergies and skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. Urostigma altissimum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it easily accessible for herbal remedies.
